TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Juan Manuel Santos ryax sa tay 10 nqu tay 8, Juan Manuel Santos, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1951) mrhuw Columbia ta' misuw hya' ga Juan Manuel Santos, aring ryax tay 7 squ byacing tay 8 sa kawas 2010 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: *uan manuel s~…ēantos~…ē rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj *, *uan manuel s~…ēantos~…ē, s~…ēquliq na s~…ēezi Ē. (minńßtuw s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) mrńßuw ¶~ ®olumő≤ia ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a *uan manuel s~…ēantos~…ē, ariŇč rjax taj * s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē
S.FORM: Juan Manuel Santos ryax sa tay 10 nqu tay 8, Juan Manuel Santos, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1951) mrhuw Columbia ta' misuw hya' ga Juan Manuel Santos, aring ryax tay 7 squ byacing tay 8 sa kawas 2010 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: *uan manuel s~…ēantos~…ē rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj *, *uan manuel s~…ēantos~…ē, s~…ēquliq na s~…ēezi Ē. (minńßtuw s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) mrńßuw ¶~ ®olumő≤ia ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a *uan manuel s~…ēantos~…ē, ariŇč rjax taj * s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē
